27447.notes: Prior authorization required by all plans. ICD-10 M17.11 (primary osteoarthritis, right knee) commonly associated.

99213.notes: No prior authorization required. Copay applies.

90837.notes: Subject to mental health parity (ACA). Must be covered under same terms as medical/surgical benefits.

99283.notes: ACA requires in-network cost-sharing regardless of network status. No prior authorization required.

33533.description: Coronary artery bypass graft (CABG), arterial, single
33533.notes: Prior authorization required by all plans. High complexity procedure.

Z23.notes: ACA preventive care mandate: must be covered at 100% with no cost share for in-network providers.

96413.notes: Prior authorization required by all plans.

93306.notes: Prior authorization required for Silver and Bronze plans. Not required for Gold.
